Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Ralan Wong D.M.D.'S Joinder To Motion Of Defendant Alek Klebaner, DDS To Bifurcate Issues is DENIED without prejudice.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Defendant Alek Klebaner Dds' Motion To Bifurcate Issues
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Alek Klebaner DDS' Motion To Bifurcate Issues:

Defendant Alek Klebaner, D.D.S.'s motion to bifurcate the issue of the statute of limitations from issues of liability and damages and for an order requiring separate juries on these issues is denied without prejudice to defendant raising the matter with the assigned trial judge. The Law and Motion Department routinely defers to the trial judge on bifurcation and other trial management issues.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
